channel_thesis: Launch through the existing trusted therapist newsletter first because this product depends on authority and relevance more than reach; a warm audience should convert faster and more credibly than cold channels.
primary_channel: Niche newsletter or community launch via the existing trusted therapist newsletter
supporting_channels: Conversion-focused landing page for email traffic
Warm partner amplification from aligned therapist educators or consultants
Organic social reposts that reinforce the newsletter launch
assets_needed: Sample benchmark charts or anonymized findings
sequence: Tease the problem and upcoming product to the newsletter audience
Measure intent with a waitlist or interest-capture email
Send the main launch email with clear value proposition and CTA
Follow with a proof email showing benchmark insights and template examples
Close with a deadline-driven final-call email
Review conversion by source before expanding beyond the owned audience
success_metrics: Landing page conversion from email traffic >= 3%
kill_criteria: Stop or reposition if recipient-to-purchase stays below 0.3% after the full launch sequence
Stop partner amplification as a priority if fewer than 2 warm partners share or their traffic underperforms materially
Do not test paid acquisition until the newsletter launch meets baseline conversion thresholds
Rework offer-message fit if clicks are healthy but purchases remain weak
